description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a two-story design with a prominent balcony on the upper floor, enclosed by glass or acrylic railings. The front yard includes a rectangular swimming pool, a swing hanging from a tree, and a sun lounger, all set on a manicured green lawn. The right side of the house has a covered carport with a slatted roof, sheltering a classic car. The rear of the bungalow is characterized by a wide staircase leading up to the balcony, and large windows provide ample natural light to the interior. The exterior walls are finished in white and light gray, with some areas accented by planters and modern outdoor furniture. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and functional, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and contemporary materials.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, balcony, pool, and carport, featuring clean lines and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the balcony, pool, swing, sun lounger, and main entrance with large windows.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the covered carport with a classic car and the slatted roof structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with windows and minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_3: Left side view featuring the wide staircase leading to the upper balcony and the swing in the yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
